summary: Complete end-to-end testing of BeraArb arbitrage trading application. Fixed critical frontend compilation error and verified all core functionality including API endpoints, dashboard, opportunities display, settings configuration, and analytics page.

minor_issues.issue: Gas price values showing as very small scientific notation (6.606e-06 gwei)
minor_issues.impact: Cosmetic display issue, does not affect functionality

critical_bugs_fixed.issue: Compilation error due to incorrect 'dark' class usage in CSS
critical_bugs_fixed.solution: Fixed @apply dark; directive in index.css and added dark class to root element

passed_tests: All 9 backend API endpoints working (100% success rate)
Dashboard page loads with live arbitrage opportunities
Connect Wallet button visible and clickable
Arbitrage opportunities table displays 4-5 opportunities with spread percentages
Gas price card displays current gas information
All 4 stat cards render correctly (opportunities, gas, profit, success rate)
Settings page loads with trading configuration sliders
Analytics page loads with wallet connection prompt
Trade modal opens with slippage settings and proper validation
Navigation between Dashboard, Settings, and Analytics works
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes
No JavaScript console errors or compilation issues

success_percentage.frontend: 95% - All core functionality working, minor gas display formatting issue
